data.title: feat: phase 5 plan 1 — chat-io contract, routing script, bats tests
data.description:
Part of #9 (Claude's Home v2.0).

Implements ROADMAP Phase 5, Plan 1.

## Requirements covered

* CHAT-01: Routing script detects `[@agent:"msg"]` and dispatches via skogparse
* CHAT-02: Unknown agents produce human-readable error, not raw JSON
* CHAT-03: Plain text without notation bypasses routing
* CHAT-04: JSON envelope is unwrapped — only the value field reaches the caller
* CHAT-05: Chat-io contract spec documents deliver/reply semantics

## Deliverables

* `docs/chat-io-contract.md` — transport-agnostic deliver/reply spec
* `bin/route-message.sh` — detects `[@agent:"msg"]`, calls `skogparse --execute`, unwraps `.value`
* Bats test suite for routing script

## Success criteria

1. Contract spec documents deliver/reply semantics, identity model, and routing behavior
2. Routing script handles `[@agent:"msg"]` notation correctly
3. Plain text passes through unrouted
4. Unknown agents produce human-readable errors
5. `fakechat/` is completely unchanged (reference only)

## Notes

* `skogparse` binary at `/home/skogix/.local/bin/skogparse --execute`
* Output format: `{"type":"string","value":"..."}` — always unwrap `.value`
* Only messages starting with `[@` are routed
